title: Frontend & User-Facing Robustness Validation

sections.title: Packaging Smoke Tests
sections.notes: CI smoke passes cleanly. Full smoke blocked by Windows paging file for scipy DLL (not a code bug). Native packaging not built (PyInstaller/NSIS not installed). macOS deferred per docs.

sections.title: UI Automation Fuzz
sections.notes: 58 API tests: 47 PASS, 8 WARN, 3 FAIL. 500 errors on /api/audit/logs (schema dict/string mismatch), /api/rules/ and /api/tax/ (missing DB columns form+line). 29 frontend tests all pass. Browser tool blocked by SSRF policy from localhost navigation — pivoted to API-level testing.

sections.title: Error Resilience
sections.notes: 8/8 tests pass. Server handles 500s, 404s, 422s, 401s gracefully. 50-request burst succeeds. Server remains alive after stress.

sections.title: Export Verification
sections.notes: 8 export formats available. All report endpoints functional via POST with query params: P&L, cash-flow, trial balance, balance sheet all return proper data structures.

sections.title: Offline & Reconnection
sections.notes: 5/6 pass (1 INFO). Token persists through simulated offline. JWT has 15-min expiration. Server recovers properly.

sections.title: Frontend Memory & Long-Run Stability
sections.notes: 4/7 PASS, 1 WARN, 2 INFO. Response sizes stable. Bundle 988KB (reasonable). No source maps. No ErrorBoundary in App.tsx — recommended. console.log in 1 file — recommended removal. Rate limiter works at ~47 rapid requests.

sections.title: Real-World Data Import Edge Cases
sections.notes: Upload endpoint accepts PDF only (by design — OCR pipeline). Validator checks extension, MIME type, magic header, and file size. 415 for non-PDF is correct behavior.

sections.title: Frontend Security Checklist
sections.notes: 9/15 PASS, 5 WARN, 1 INFO. JWT proper (exp, sub, iat). No hardcoded secrets. X-Content-Type-Options and X-Frame-Options set. HSTS not set (acceptable for dev). /api/tests/ returns 200 in dev mode (excluded only in production).

critical_issues.root_cause: AuditEntryOut.details expects dict but model stores as JSON string. model_validate() fails.
critical_issues.fix: Parse e.details from JSON string to dict in router, or add Pydantic validator

critical_issues.root_cause: CategorizationRule model has form and line columns but DB table lacks them (migration gap)
critical_issues.fix: Create Alembic migration to add form (VARCHAR) and line (VARCHAR) columns to categorization_rules table

overall_verdict: PASS with 3 pre-existing issues (2 medium, 1 low) — all require James's approval for backend code changes
